{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230229157FC2DF2AF4A5112986B4"}"},"total":23272},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7038954779041202958","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看过最好看的龙傲天都市小说了，唯一一次感觉对无敌男主不排斥，我一个男生都看得停不下来。对小鲸鱼刻画的太好了，赶快更吧，2000章感觉不够看","text_exts":[{"e":9,"s":6,"text":"龙傲天","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774204155112986B4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227038954779041202958%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226804719854176701451%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1638884374,"group_id":"6804719854176701451","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9DBJXk8Ms5bD3NRI4gvN9gI2MDgaua1m/2zj1mTqRHz","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2366571530429182","user_name":"爱吃减肥菜的赵楚"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2366571530429182","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6804719854176701451","book_info":{"abstract":"（唯美种田文+单女主+悠闲乡村+萌娃萌宠）
他是令人威风丧胆的华夏兵王。
她国际一线女神巨星！
两个人意外产下一子。
“我儿子是华夏人！”秦云艮带着儿子回到秦家村。 
从此以后，他带着儿子开启了采菊东篱下，开机直播间的生活。
他利用神秘空间，简简单单种点菜、养养花，带着大黄和猞猁抓点兔子做麻辣兔肉，带上熊猫团团欺负一下山里的动物们，不知不觉间，就成为了全世界富豪们梦寐以求的天堂！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eb6caf87c992d0716ccd24aa81932731","author":"稣木鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"6804719854176701451","book_name":"刚退伍，绝美女神告诉我当爹了！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6804730264799937037","read_count":"50853","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"5078508"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"2453","tags":"都市种田,都市,乡村,奶爸,空间,特种兵,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/68035fdf5b631013c8e756e7ae28fb32~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779388155&x-signature=MHnn0lVlibhdD7dRyjC4ijSqzjQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"6640161880","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.70533293e+08"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230229157FC2DF2AF4A5112986B4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读47小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":170533,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":19057},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7212898171776418572","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"读后点评：主题为战神甜宠奶爸、乡村生活与发展！主角秦云艮为令敌人闻风丧胆的龙牙特战队队长，于非洲执行特殊任务，保家卫国，因不幸头部中弹无奈退役。随后，在洛杉矶与爱人著好莱坞女星再次相逢，并发现自己有了一个充满可爱的宝宝小鲸鱼，带着萌宝回归故里秦家村。在不经意间拥有了神秘空间，利用神秘空间中的灵水发展种植养殖业，吸引各路豪强与美食爱好者，过上宠妻宠宝、家庭和谐幸福之路。同时创办小鲸鱼农庄有限公司，带领乡亲发家致富，走上另一条康庄幸福之路。剧情温馨，构思有趣，逻辑通达，文笔诙谐。总体上来说，是奶爸甜宠类中的精品之作，给予5星好评，予以鼓励！！！","text_exts":[{"e":207,"s":203,"text":"发家致富","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8F%91%E5%AE%B6%E8%87%B4%E5%AF%8C&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774204155112986B4%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227212898171776418572%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226804719854176701451%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8F%91%E5%AE%B6%E8%87%B4%E5%AF%8C%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1679383890,"group_id":"6804719854176701451","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"偏好：历史、科技、创业、官场、甜宠、萌宝、单女，三观正
